description: A colophon on a Bible. Was first acquired by ʿAzaryahu ha-Kohen (ha-ḥamishi ba-ḥavura). It was later sold to Abū l-Faraj Hibatallāh Netanʾel b. Ḥalfon al-Ḥamawī (might be the same as in T-S Ar.18(1).51 (PGPID 8159) and T-S 16.244 (PGPID 3469)). It was later sold to Abū l-Faraj Nissim b. Mevorakh. AA/ASE
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
